name: Dionex Corporation
description: Dionex Corporation is a leading manufacturer and marketer of liquid chromatography and extraction systems, software, and consumables. The company's products are used worldwide by pharmaceutical, environmental, chemical, life science, and food and beverage industries for chemical analysis and research. Dionex was acquired by Thermo Fisher Scientific in 2011, integrating its chromatography and ion analysis technologies into Thermo Fisher's extensive analytical instruments portfolio.
